name: Basic Fishing Equipment
description:
Basic Fishing Equipment includes a pole, a line, a hook, and either a lure or some bait.
Fishing is a popular pastime in Wildspace and the Astral Sea, though this activity isn't possible aboard a ship that is moving faster than its flying speed. At the end of each hour spent fishing, a character can make a {@dc 15} Wisdom ({@skill Survival}) check. A failed check indicates no fish is caught during that hour. On a successful check, roll a {@dice d10} and consult the Fishing table to determine the
